subcodes.first_line: Lo, the tale of falsehood hath arisen anew; they that are filled with malice and hatred have set themselves against the friends of God, seeking to lead them astray [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: حدیث کذب مجدد شد اهل ضغینه و بغضا در صدد دوستان الهی افتاده اند و در اضلال
subcodes.subjects: @corruption and decline of Islam; of the Shi'ih, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @rejection, opposition and persecution
